steps.title: Identify the vertex
steps.content: The function $f(\theta) = -0.32(\theta - 31)^2 + 920$ is written in vertex form. The value inside the parentheses gives the $\theta$-coordinate of the vertex: $\theta = 31$.
steps.formula: $$\text{Vertex form: } y = a(x - h)^2 + k \text{ has vertex at } x = h$$

steps.title: Confirm maximum and select answer
steps.content: Since $a = -0.32 \lt 0$, the parabola opens downward, so the vertex is a maximum point. The angle that gives the greatest airflow is $\theta = 31$ degrees. That confirms C is correct.
